user_query:
Please process my AMM research notes and produce a clean export and summary, using only relative workspace paths.

1) Read both input/amm_notes.md and input/research_focus.txt. Treat each bullet point in input/amm_notes.md as a separate AMM log entry with the value equal to the bullet text (do not merge bullets).

2) Create two exports of the resulting log under output/:
   - output/amm-export.csv with the exact header line "timestamp,command,value" and one row per entry.
   - output/amm-export.json as a line-delimited JSON (JSONL) file where each line is an object with keys ts, cmd, and val for the same set of entries. (If you prefer a JSON array, keep the same objects and filename; just ensure the CSV row count matches the JSON record count.)

3) For each term listed in input/research_focus.txt (one per line), run a case-insensitive search on the log values and write a machine-readable count map to output/search_counts.json. The JSON object must include keys for at least "impermanent loss" and "slippage" with integer counts (0 is acceptable if not present).

4) Write output/summary.md that includes all of the following:
   - A line starting with "Entries: " followed by the total number of entries (this must match the number of data rows in output/amm-export.csv, excluding the header).
   - Two lines of the form "Impermanent loss matches: X" and "Slippage matches: Y" whose numbers exactly match the values in output/search_counts.json for those terms.
   - An "Insights" section synthesizing patterns, design trade-offs, and security considerations from the notes (aim for at least ~120 words).
   - An "Action Items" section with at least three bullet points.

5) Also write output/config_snapshot.txt that includes a line with: project=dex-audit

Make sure all artifacts are written under output/ and all reads are from input/. Use only relative paths within the workspace.
